headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -57.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 14% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 138 quotes including 109 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• Despite the high volume, frustration scores dropped significantly from yesterday's peak but remain well above the typical range.

• Fears plummeted from yesterday's elevated levels while optimism stayed deeply negative with minimal change.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
